news.headline: Filmmaker Ilker Catak’s ‘Yellow Letters’ pits artists against the powerful
news.summary: Filmmaker Ilker Catak explains how his political thriller – exploring authoritarianism and the artistic process – grew out of a desire to examine the complexities of marriage. "Yellow Letters", which won the top prize at the Berlin Film Festival, serves as a cautionary tale. Catak says the story is

news.headline: US adds 178,000 jobs in March, rebounding from February losses
news.summary:
American employers added a surprisingly strong 178,000 new jobs last month, rebounding from a dismal February, while the unemployment rate dipped to 4.3 per cent.
The Labor Department reported on Friday that hiring marked a rebound from the loss of 133,000 jobs in February.

news.headline: Sanaullah says petrol prices increased as a consequence of Middle East war, govt has ‘nothing to do with it’
news.summary:
<p>Prime Minister’s Adviser on Political Affairs Rana Sanaullah on Friday said that the prices of petroleum products had increased due to the ongoing war in the Middle East, adding that the government “has nothing to do with it”.</p>

news.headline: Cuba to release more than 2,000 prisoners as US pressure mounts
news.summary: US President Trump has made clear his desire to change Cuba's leadership and has placed the country under an oil embargo.
